headline: Meeting Log & Planning
sub:
Write anything, from meeting notes to ideas, and the essentials are automatically organized into a dev-ready spec.
Ready to hand straight to Cursor or Claude.
mcp_title: Connect AI coding agent (Cursor / Claude Code)

edit_guard.title: Unsaved changes
edit_guard.body: If you leave now, your edits will be lost. Do you want to continue?

sample_notice: 💡 This sample uses the real AI pipeline. Saving will consume approximately 15,000–25,000 tokens.
review_gate: ✋ Review mode — Check the CPS and proceed when ready.
recover_hint:
A background job may have failed or been stopped.
Use [Retry] or [Rebuild Master] to recover.

empty_cps.title: No Core Summary (CPS) yet
empty_cps.has_logs: You have {count} log(s) but CPS hasn't been generated yet.
empty_cps.no_logs_hint: First save your meeting content in the Meeting Log tab.
empty_cps.auto_create: CPS will be generated automatically when you save.

empty_prd.title: No PRD yet
empty_prd.review_hint: In Review mode, click [Generate PRD] manually after reviewing the CPS.
empty_prd.go_cps: Go to the CPS tab and click the generate button.
empty_prd.need_cps: CPS needs to be ready first.
empty_prd.auto_hint: Saving a meeting log will generate CPS and PRD together in Auto mode.
empty_prd.auto_no_prd:
The meeting log was processed, but the PRD hasn't been generated yet.
Use the Generate PRD button below, or it'll be created automatically when you save the next meeting log.

toast.batch_all_complete: Batch complete — all meeting data has been updated.
toast.batch_complete: Batch processing complete — all meeting data has been updated.
toast.design_needs_update: 📐 {version} has been reflected in the PRD — go to the Design page and click [Latest Update] to regenerate SPACK · DDD · Architecture.
toast.extract_lenient: {version} ⚠️ AI estimate — the meeting was vague, so AI aggressively inferred the spec. Please review the result.
toast.extract_skip: {version} ℹ️ No spec changes in this meeting — classified as a report/completion. Will accumulate with the next meeting.
toast.meeting_complete_review: {version} CPS generated — review and click [Generate PRD] to proceed.
toast.prd_error: {version} ⚠️ CPS saved, but PRD generation failed — please reprocess the meeting or retry with [Generate PRD].
toast.meeting_saved_bg: {version} saved — processing continues in the background. (~2 min)
toast.cps_ready_review: CPS generated — review and click [Generate PRD] to proceed.
toast.save_fail: Save failed. Please try again later.
toast.prd_done: PRD generated — check the PRD tab.
toast.notion_disconnected: Notion disconnected. Please reconnect on the Profile page.
toast.auto_mode_on: Auto mode — CPS · PRD will be generated automatically and edit buttons will be hidden.
toast.auto_mode_off: Review mode — CPS · PRD are editable; PRD must be triggered manually.
toast.rebuild_timeout: Rebuild timed out (5 min). It may still be running in the background. Refresh after a moment.
toast.server_error: Server error ({status}). Please try again later.
toast.rebuild_fail: Rebuild failed. Please try again later.
toast.jobs_stopped: Jobs stopped. Already-processed content will appear on refresh.
toast.partial_delete_fail: {version} partial data deletion failed. Please delete manually and retry.

confirm.delete_message:
[{version}] Delete this meeting log?

• The CPS / PRD Delta for this version will also be deleted.
• The master CPS / PRD will be auto-rebuilt from remaining logs.
(AI rebuild may take 30–60 seconds)

bg_notice.batch_sub: Analyzing {label} now · CPS · PRD fill in automatically when done
bg_notice.view_in_log: View details in the meeting log tab
bg_notice.single_sub: {stage} · Takes about 2 minutes on average. CPS · PRD fill in automatically when done.
bg_notice.alert_stale: The task may be unresponsive. Try refreshing the page or again in a moment.
bg_notice.alert_warn: This is taking longer than expected. Please hold on a little more.

editor.meeting_cost_hint: Saving uses 1 meeting log · re-saving after edits also counts as 1
editor.log_template:
### [Meeting Log] - Enter meeting topic here

* **Date:** YYYY-MM-DD (HH:MM – HH:MM)
* **Attendees:**

#### Discussion
* **(Role/Name)**: ""
* **(Role/Name)**: ""

#### Decisions
-

#### Action Items
- [ ]

#### Next Meeting
* **Date:**
* **Agenda:**
editor.template_overwrite_confirm:
Overwrite current content with the template?

Cancel to keep your existing content.
editor.transcript_overwrite_confirm:
Overwrite current content with the transcription result?

Cancel to keep your existing content.
editor.placeholder_default:
Write your meeting notes here, or use the "Insert Template" / "Upload Audio" buttons above to get started quickly.

Don't worry about format — paste Slack threads, emails, or raw notes and AI will organize them.
editor.file_too_large: File is too large ({size}MB). Maximum is {max}MB. Please split it into shorter segments.
editor.transcript_chunking: Transcribing the long recording in parts... ({cur}/{total})
editor.transcript_chunked_done: Long recording transcribed ({total} parts). Speaker labels (A:/B:) may differ across parts — review before saving.
editor.transcript_too_long: The recording is too long. Up to {max} minutes can be processed. Please split it into shorter pieces.
editor.transcript_decode_failed: This browser couldn't process the audio. Try a different format or a smaller file.
editor.file_too_large_retry: File is too large. Please upload a file under 30MB.
editor.file_format_error: Unsupported file format. Please upload an audio file: mp3 / m4a / mp4 / wav / webm.
editor.transcript_done: Transcription complete{duration}. Review the content before saving.
editor.transcript_truncated: The transcript was long and may have been cut off. Split the recording into shorter segments and re-upload to get the full text.
editor.transcript_partial: Transcribed {done} of {total} segments. The rest failed due to an error — review and save what was captured, or try again.
editor.transcript_truncated_save_confirm: This transcript may be cut off due to a length limit. An incomplete meeting log can affect the quality of later design/planning. Save it anyway?
editor.transcript_truncated_banner: This transcript may be cut off — please check it's complete before saving.
editor.transcript_quota_warn: This transcription may need about {est} tokens, but you only have {remaining} tokens left. Exceeding the limit could block other tasks this month. We recommend splitting the recording into shorter segments. Proceed anyway?
editor.too_short: Meeting log is too short ({len} chars). Please write at least {min} characters of meeting content for AI analysis. 💡 Include actual discussions, decisions, and action items.
editor.insert_template_title_overwrite: Overwrite current content with the template
editor.upload_audio_title: Transcribes a meeting recording into text as-is — summarizing/organizing happens automatically after you save. (max 30MB, mp3/m4a/mp4/wav/webm)
editor.ai_processing_desc: AI is analyzing your meeting log — Core Summary (CPS) and PRD will be filled in automatically when done.
editor.ai_processing_hint: ~2–6 min · You can navigate away and processing will continue in the background
editor.char_min_hint: — at least {min} characters of meeting content required for AI analysis
editor.save_too_short_title: Write at least {min} characters (excluding spaces) to start
editor.char_remaining: — {n} more characters to start AI analysis
editor.discard_confirm_message:
Discard what you've written?

This cannot be undone.
editor.empty_select: Select a version or write a new log

review.title_on: Review mode ON — CPS/PRD editable. Click to switch to Auto mode.
review.title_off: Auto mode ON — CPS · PRD generated automatically. Click to switch to Review mode (editable).
review.title_busy: Can't switch mode while a meeting log is processing — try again once it finishes.

quota.label: Meeting logs
quota.title: {tier} tier — meeting logs {used}/{limit} used
quota.title_reset: {tier} tier — meeting logs {used}/{limit} used (auto-resets in {days} days)

notion.no_design_data: No design to share yet. Generate SPACK · DDD · Architecture first.
notion.export_sub_html: Organize and share {project}'s planning & design into Notion.
notion.export_pick_parent_title: First share — pick where to save it in Notion
notion.export_pick_parent_sub: A 'project hub' is created under the page you pick. Choose once; it's automatic after that.
notion.export_empty_docs: Select at least one document to share.
notion.blocked_warn: This page was classified as a non-meeting page and cannot be processed.
notion.truncated_warn: The original was long, so part of it was truncated. Review the result and fill in anything missing.
notion.tier_warn: 🟡 Caution — may not be a meeting log
notion.tier_block: 🔴 Not usable — not a meeting log
notion.edited_chip_title: {count} characters different from the AI cleanup — your edits will be saved as-is on import
notion.hint_start_html: 💡 Below is the Notion original preview. To have AI reformat it into a meeting-log format, click the "Start AI Analysis" button.
notion.hint_start_sub: Cleanup takes about 30 sec – 1 min and consumes tokens per tier.
notion.analyze_title: AI reformats it into a meeting-log format
notion.working_sub: About 30 sec – 1 min. Please wait a moment.
notion.hint_done_html: 💡 AI reformatted the Notion page into a meeting-log format. Review the content below, then click "Add {version}" at the bottom to finish. If needed,
notion.banner_warn_title: This may not be a meeting log
notion.banner_warn_html: . CPS/PRD analysis quality may drop, so review the results more carefully.
notion.banner_block_html: and cannot be processed. Harness is a tool for analyzing software meetings / discussions. Please select a different page.
notion.revert_title: Revert to the original cleanup result (currently {count} chars, {diff} chars different)
notion.renormalize_title: Let AI clean up again (discards your edits)
notion.edit_banner_html: There is no separate save button. Your edits are registered automatically when you click "Add {version}" at the bottom.
notion.textarea_placeholder: Edit the meeting log directly — there's no separate save button. The 'Add' button at the bottom registers the current edit state as-is.
notion.foot_ready_html: ✓ Ready — review and register with the Add {version} button
notion.foot_error: ✗ Not a meeting page — please select a different page
notion.import_disabled_title: Can be registered after AI cleanup
notion.no_results_hint: Check whether you've shared the page with the Notion integration.
notion.guide_title: Import a meeting log in 3 steps
notion.guide_step1_label: Select a page on the left
notion.guide_step1_desc: Search and click the Notion page to import
notion.guide_step2_desc: Reformat the Notion original into a meeting-log format (30 sec–1 min, consumes tokens)
notion.guide_step3_desc: CPS · PRD analysis runs in the background (~2 min)
notion.guide_warn: ⚠ To start, please select a project first
notion.err_preview_fail: Failed to preview the Notion page.
notion.err_normalize_fail: Failed to convert the Notion page.
notion.err_import_fail: Failed to import the Notion page.
notion.err_not_linked: Your Notion workspace is not connected. Please connect it first on the profile page.
notion.err_token_revoked: The Notion connection was lost. Please reconnect on the profile page.
notion.err_rate_limited: Hit the Notion API rate limit. Please try again in a moment.
notion.err_not_found: The page could not be found or you don't have access. (Check whether the page is shared with the integration.)
notion.err_page_empty: The selected page is empty or has no convertible content.
notion.err_page_too_short: The selected page is too short for meeting-log analysis (at least 200 characters required).
notion.err_normalize_format: The conversion result doesn't follow the standard format. Please try again.
notion.err_content_not_supported: This page isn't the meeting-log format Harness analyzes. Please select a page that contains software development meeting/discussion content.
notion.err_bad_request: The page ID format is invalid.
notion.err_upstream: The Notion server response was abnormal. Please try again in a moment.

batch.title: Sequential processing of sample meeting logs
batch.description_html: Select a sample file or upload a txt file to save meeting logs sequentially. After each log is saved, the next one is processed once CPS & PRD generation/merge completes. Any format works — --- dividers or meeting title/date headers are auto-split; otherwise the file is registered as one log.
batch.exists_tag_title: This version already exists. Selecting and processing it will overwrite the existing data.
batch.hint_select_log: Please select at least one log to process
batch.progress_cancelled_bg: Stopped — the current item is finishing in the background (auto-refreshes when done)
batch.progress_cancelled: Stopped — {done} processed, the rest were cancelled
batch.badge_lenient_title: AI extracted the spec by inferring aggressively — review recommended. Happens when the log is vague or report-style.
batch.badge_skip_title: No new spec derived from this meeting (test results / status report, etc.). No change to system data.
batch.retry_hint: After cleaning up the partially saved data of {version} (meeting log · CPS · PRD · merged), it will be reprocessed.
batch.stop_confirm:
Stop sequential processing immediately?

• All remaining queued items will be cancelled.
• The item currently processing finishes automatically on the backend, and its result will be added to History shortly.
batch.upload_saved: "{name}" was saved to your upload history.

history.new_log_drafting: Already drafting a new meeting log
history.new_log_in_batch: Unavailable while the batch panel is open
history.processing_disabled: Unavailable while analysis is in progress

user_guide.headline: Meeting Log & Planning
user_guide.sub: A single meeting log flows automatically into CPS → PRD → dev rules.
user_guide.step1_desc: Upload your meeting notes as .txt / .md files or paste them directly. Versions (v1.0, v1.1 …) are assigned automatically and the change history accumulates.
user_guide.step1_tip: Just drag & drop a .txt and upload only the single most recent meeting.
user_guide.step2_desc: AI analyzes the meeting log to derive the core Problem and Solution. When the log changes, only the affected sections are regenerated automatically.
user_guide.step2_tip: When the meeting log goes from v1.0 → v1.1, the CPS updates automatically too.
user_guide.step3_desc: Breaks the CPS down into an Epic → User Story → Acceptance Criteria tree. Produces a flawless PRD ready for dev ticketing.
user_guide.step3_tip: Each Story comes with verifiable Acceptance Criteria (AC).
user_guide.step4_desc: Automatically derives project rules to check code compliance in the Lint stage. Registers recommended skills by category.
user_guide.step4_tip: Pick AI-recommended skills from the catalog and register them to apply them automatically on the next Lint run.

github.intro: One line — a GitHub repo URL — and AI analyzes the code to auto-generate the project's first spec.
github.url_invalid: That's not a valid GitHub URL. Example: https://github.com/owner/repo
github.name_too_long: Project name must be 50 characters or fewer.
github.complete_toast: 📋 '{name}' analysis complete{reduction} — moving to the PRD review screen.
github.started_toast: 🤖 '{name}' AI analysis started (about 30–60 sec). You can keep working on other screens.
github.err_name_taken: That project name is already in use.

autofix_busy_banner: PRD completion (AI) is running or awaiting review — processing meeting notes now would invalidate the completion result. Apply or cancel it first.
remote_busy_banner: This project is being processed on another device or tab — buttons re-enable when it finishes.
